body.title: Review design: prior-art gate in /sorted + every-flag-stamps-io_corpus invariant
body.description:
**Problem:** Two standing-habit guardrails surfaced in the Fable review 2026-07-06 (note cc.0.fable-review-builder-levers-2026-07-06) as high-value process changes. They were initially left as narrative recommendations in D-fable-builder-empirical-program-2026-07-06 — an anti-pattern (Akien 2026-07-06: 'we don't leave those kinds of recommendation in a narrative; better to write a high priority ticket to review the design'). This ticket is the design review that decides and spawns implementation.

**Guardrail 1 — prior-art gate:** Add a step to /sorted for L / HIGH-design-risk decisions: 'Who has already solved this? 30-minute survey before the first build ticket.' Rationale: the aider/SWE-agent survey was the highest-ROI act in four months of builder work and came only AFTER three sessions tuning the wrong layer. This is the structural compensation for the recurring wrong-layer-diagnosis-under-momentum failure mode.

**Guardrail 2 — every-flag-stamps-io_corpus invariant:** Add an audit-smell check (and a code invariant) that every behavior flag on AgenticLoop (aci_mode / plan_mode / critic_enabled / history_window_turns / tool_names / role) is stamped into the io_corpus record, so ANY run is post-hoc classifiable. Rationale: flag sprawl already produced one real bug (aci_mode windowing starved the architect); invisible mode-state is undebuggable.

**Proposed shape:** Review each guardrail for correctness / scope / conflicts, return a keep-modify-drop verdict + rationale per guardrail, then FILE the implementation tickets for the keepers (skill edit for #1; audit-smell check + code stamping for #2) — or record the reasoning if dropped.

**Affected files:** None in this ticket (design review only). Implementation targets: skills/sorted/SKILL.md; skills/audit-smell/; unseen_university/devices/inference/agentic_loop.py + io_corpus.py. This review ticket touches NOTHING — it produces verdicts + spawned tickets.
**Design rules:** skills live in repo skills/ (symlink single-source, no copy-sync); no SQLite; every-flag stamping itself must be flat-file/JSON on the corpus record.
**Scope boundary:** DESIGN REVIEW + spawn implementation tickets ONLY — do not implement either guardrail here.
**Completion criteria:**
- Each guardrail carries a recorded keep / modify / drop verdict with rationale.
- For each keeper, an implementation ticket is filed (linked to a decision) — none left as narrative prose.
- If either is dropped, the reasoning is recorded on this ticket's close.
**Test plan:** none — design-review ticket; the spawned implementation tickets carry their own proofs.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

## Review outcome (2026-07-06)
**Guardrail 1 (prior-art gate): KEEP + MODIFY.** Home = folded into audit-design (already runs before tickets drafted; already has Check 3 alternatives-considered + Check 5 what-am-I-missing), NOT a new manual /sorted step. Trigger = decision CLASS (build-a-mechanism), NOT ticket size — the case it's for (D-ds-inference-context-management) was S/M bug-fix-shaped, so a size gate would have missed it. AMEND prompts a 30-min survey; waive-with-reason allowed. => T-sorted-prior-art-gate-in-audit-design (M, 0.5).
**Guardrail 2 (every-flag-stamps-io_corpus): KEEP + MODIFY.** Confirmed gap: record has role/turn/foreground but NOT aci_mode/plan_mode/critic_enabled/history_window_turns/tool_names (the exact flags behind the aci_mode-starved-architect bug). Invariant = a STRUCTURAL TEST (introspect __init__ flag-params subset of corpus flag keys — self-maintaining for future flags), not just an audit-smell lint. Also 2x2 integrity. => T-agentic-loop-flags-in-corpus (M, 0.6).
**Neither dropped.** Out of scope (deliberately not spawned): 'flags-to-text' (reduce the flag set, not just stamp it) — a separate concern; not parked as a recommendation, just noted as outside this review's two named guardrails.
body.intention: I intend that high-value process guardrails are tracked as claimable work, not left to rot as narrative prose — because a recommendation in a decision narrative is invisible to the queue and never gets worked (Akien 2026-07-06 correction). Serves CP4 (make everything suck less) applied to our own process.
body.result: Design review complete: both guardrails KEEP+MODIFY. Prior-art gate -> fold into audit-design, trigger on decision-class not ticket-size (T-sorted-prior-art-gate-in-audit-design). Flag-stamping -> confirmed io_corpus gap, structural-test invariant (T-agentic-loop-flags-in-corpus). Verdicts recorded, both impl tickets filed + wired into the decision.
body.unproven_reason: design-review ticket has no red-form; the deliverable is the recorded verdicts + the two spawned implementation tickets (which carry their own red->green proofs) — the tickets existing in the queue IS the observable outcome
